name: Save the sheep
short_description: Sheep are a valuable resource, protect your sheep! Hire soldiers and build barricades on the enemy's path! Explode bombs and set traps!
detailed_description:
As you know, sheep are an important part of the kingdom's economy! And for the kingdom to prosper, you should take care of your sheep! Place guards in the fields to fight off waves of enemies who want to destroy our sheep! Set up barricades that will hold off the enemy while our archers deal with the intruders. Explode bombs in crowds of enemies to reduce the number of aggressors. You need to survive 10 waves of enemies and your sheep are safe!

Sheep are a valuable resource, protect your sheep! Hire soldiers and build barricades on the enemy's path! Explode bombs and set traps! The enemy is very dangerous, he will attack, shoot from afar and try to win in a crowd. Place your soldiers wisely and you will win!

-Beautiful graphics
-Interesting gameplay
-Crowds of enemies
